summary: Implemented the React/Vite frontend shell with a light, airy split-view workspace, dominant map stage, and structured evidence panel.

assertions_verified.evidence: Rendered shell places search/summary above a dominant map stage with evidence panel alongside; screenshot saved at artifacts/verification/TASK-FE-001/frontend_shell_round_1.png
Visual system uses bright canvas, serif display typography, restrained architectural palette, and avoids generic admin dashboard chrome.
npm build completed successfully using Vite + React + TypeScript with MapLibre dependency installed.
